items.content_html: HT++ is a transpiled programming language designed to bridge the gap between the ease of use of AutoHotkey-like syntax and the performance of C++. It allows developers familiar with AutoHotkey to leverage the power and efficiency of C++ by writing code in a familiar syntax.
items.title: TheMaster1127/HT-plus-plus: HT++ is a transpiled programming language designed to bridge the gap between the ease of use of AutoHotkey-like syntax and the performance of C++. It allows developers familiar with AutoHotkey to leverage the power and efficiency of C++ by writing code in a familiar syntax.

items.content_html: F10(suspend/resume process). F12(on/off borderless fullscreen). F11(un/lock mouse cursor in active window). Pause(ALT+F4/hold restarts PC). Control 4button Mouse with keyboard. Insert a character by long pressing the key. LWin(CTRL+F, hold/double shows/hide taskbar). Menu(CTRL+C/V/A). ALT+Shift(half window size+position+maximize). ALT+Ctrl(desktop)
items.title: hornster02/hornster02: F10(suspend/resume process). F12(on/off borderless fullscreen). F11(un/lock mouse cursor in active window). Pause(ALT+F4/hold restarts PC). Control 4button Mouse with keyboard. Insert a character by long pressing the key. LWin(CTRL+F, hold/double shows/hide taskbar). Menu(CTRL+C/V/A). ALT+Shift(half window size+position+maximize). ALT+Ctrl(desktop)

items.content_html: This is a macro that whenever you press ctrl + q it will send the cat gif combo to whoever is selected on discord keep in mind that discord has to be open to use this macro and if it doesn't work the first time with the .exe then just try to install autohotkey version 2 and then run the .exe.
items.title: TheHunt990/DiscordCatCombo: This is a macro that whenever you press ctrl + q it will send the cat gif combo to whoever is selected on discord keep in mind that discord has to be open to use this macro and if it doesn't work the first time with the .exe then just try to install autohotkey version 2 and then run the .exe.
